name: recommendation_tasks
description: Small autonomy benchmark pack for skill recommendation quality across common project scenarios.

tasks.title: Recommend skills for a Python library release
tasks.goal: Ship a Python library release with packaging, testing, and publish readiness.

tasks.title: Recommend skills for a CLI bug fix
tasks.goal: Trace and fix a regression in a command-line tool while preserving behavior.

tasks.title: Recommend skills for a fullstack feature change
tasks.goal: Add a user-facing feature that touches both frontend and backend code.

tasks.title: Recommend skills for an agent workflow task
tasks.goal: Plan, execute, and verify a multi-step autonomous workflow with clear handoffs.
